name: Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench with your feet flat on the floor. Grip the barbell with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lower the bar to your chest, then press it up until your arms are fully extended.
formTips: Keep your back flat against the bench
Control the weight on the way down
Breathe out on the way up, in on the way down

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set an incline bench to 30-45 degrees. Hold dumbbells with palms facing forward. Lower to chest level and press up, focusing on upper chest contraction.
formTips: Don't lock elbows at the top

name: Push-ups
instructions: Start in plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulders. Lower body until chest nearly touches floor, then push back up to starting position.
formTips: Maintain straight line from head to heels

name: Deadlifts
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, bend at hips and knees to grip the bar. Keep back straight, lift by extending hips and knees, then lower with controlled movement.

name: Pull-ups
instructions: Grip bar with hands slightly wider than shoulders. Pull body up until chin is over the bar, then lower with controlled movement.

name: Bent Over Rows
instructions: Hinge at hips with knees slightly bent. Hold dumbbells with palms facing each other. Pull dumbbells to chest level, squeezing shoulder blades together.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Sit or stand with back straight. Press dumbbells or barbell overhead until arms are fully extended, then lower with control.

name: Lateral Raises
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides. Raise arms to shoulder height, leading with elbows, then lower with control.

name: Bicep Curls
instructions: Stand with dumbbells in hands, palms facing forward. Curl weights up towards shoulders, then lower with control.

name: Tricep Pushdowns
instructions: Attach rope to cable machine. Grip rope with palms facing each other. Push down until arms are fully extended, then return to starting position.

name: Skull Crushers
instructions: Lie on bench holding EZ bar. Lower bar to forehead, then extend arms by pushing bar away from forehead.

name: Squats
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower hips back and down until thighs are parallel to floor, then return to starting position.
formTips: Keep chest up and back straight

name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit in leg press machine with feet shoulder-width apart. Push platform away until legs are nearly extended, then return to starting position.

name: Lunges
instructions: Step forward with one leg, lowering hips until both knees are at 90-degree angles. Push back to starting position and repeat with other leg.
formTips: Don't let front knee go past toes

name: Calf Raises
instructions: Stand on edge of step or platform. Rise up onto toes, hold for a moment, then lower back down with control.

name: Plank
instructions: Hold push-up position with forearms on ground. Keep body in straight line from head to heels. Hold for specified time.

name: Crunches
instructions: Lie on back with knees bent. Place hands behind head or across chest. Lift shoulders off floor using abs, then lower back down.

name: Leg Raises
instructions: Lie on back with hands under hips. Raise legs straight up towards ceiling, then lower back down with control.
formTips: Keep lower back pressed into floor
